title: rubus rotundifoliatus
intro: Rubus rotundifoliatus, also known as the Japanese round-leaf raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Japan. The medicinal properties of Rubus rotundifoliatus lie in its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Rubus rotundifoliatus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Japanese medicine to support overall well-being.
